# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2021-03-01
    name: [FunctionAppName]
    location: [Location]
    kind: functionapp,linux
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', '[AppServicePlanName]')]"
      httpsOnly: true

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [unique-guid1]
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', '[FunctionAppName]'), '2021-03-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b7e6dc6d-f48c-477e-9b74-a6c7b2c0f704')]" # Storage Blob Data Contributor
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', '[StorageAccountName]')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [unique-guid2]
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', '[FunctionAppName]'), '2021-03-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'f7c8e6d4-f7b6-4c5e-a3fe-689bbaad8876')]" # Key Vault Secrets User
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', '[KeyVaultName]')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [unique-guid3]
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', '[FunctionAppName]'), '2021-03-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b6f5c7e1-8dd7-40a0-a6d2-e4bf4e4b9a7f')]" # SQL DB Contributor
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', '[SqlServerName]', '[SqlDatabaseName]')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [unique-guid4]
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', '[FunctionAppName]'), '2021-03-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'a25f7dcd-b782-4b2e-962c-6a6bfc2b038d')]" # Cosmos DB Account Reader
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', '[CosmosDbAccountName]')]"
